name: veogenie
description: Connect Codex to the locally installed VeoGenie desktop app through a drive-independent MCP launcher with workflow guidance for nodes, prompt-authoring mode choice, model choice, image-first video inputs, continuity assets, viral video scripts, video prompts, shared voice routing, and local video merge nodes.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local VeoGenie desktop app from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds MCP tools and lightweight agent guides for the locally installed VeoGenie desktop app. Codex can inspect pages, understand node roles, decide whether Codex or a reusable AI Assistant node should write prompts, choose suitable image/video models, plan image-first video workflows with minimal necessary references, plan reusable continuity assets before video generation, write hook-driven viral-style scripts, split scripts into multi-scene video workflows, connect text, image, video, and voice inputs correctly, reuse one voice across multiple video nodes, connect generated clips into a local videoMerge node for ordered lossless merging, write video prompts, and export generated media when the user enables the matching permission. The default configuration is read-only and connects through a plugin-bundled launcher that resolves the installed app launcher without assuming a fixed C:, D:, or E: drive.
defaultPrompt: List VeoGenie pages and node counts.
Read the current VeoGenie media album.
Attach a user chat image to a VeoGenie image reference node.
Record VeoGenie feedback into project memory docs.
Decide whether Codex or a VeoGenie AI Assistant node should write a prompt.
Choose VeoGenie models for realistic images, high-quality images, and videos.
Plan an image-first VeoGenie video workflow and omit redundant video references.
Plan missing character, prop, wardrobe, product, and location references before a multi-scene video.
Plan a viral-style multi-scene VeoGenie video workflow with natural dialogue.
Route VeoGenie video frames, reference images, and voice inputs correctly.
Design a VeoGenie workflow with correct text, image, video, and voice ports.
Connect one VeoGenie voice node to multiple video nodes.
Merge ordered VeoGenie video clips with a videoMerge node.
